HGSS.440.0000:
Hi!\f
Red’s been away. He hasn’t called
either, so I have no idea where he\r
is or what he’s been doing.\f
They say no news is good news,
but I do worry about him.
HGSS.440.0001:
I worry about Red getting hurt or
sick, but he’s a boy. I’m proud that\r
he is doing what he wants to do.
HGSS.440.0002:
They have shows that aren’t
aired in Johto...
